sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲怎么把 Claude Code 编程化调用，不用每次都手工进对话界面。
适合脚本、命令行流程、Python、TypeScript 这些自动化场景。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像把帮工从院子里请到流水线上。你不是站在旁边一句句吩咐，而是把活写进程序，让它照着跑。
这页会讲基本调用、结构化输出、流式返回、自动批准工具这些能力。
如果你想把 Claude 接进你自己的程序或 CI，这页非常关键。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先从最小示例跑通，别一上来就接整条生产流水。
如果后面还要给别的程序继续吃结果，优先研究结构化输出。
自动批准工具和自动提交这类能力要特别慎重，最好先小范围试。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Basic usage
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Add the -p (or --print) flag to any claude command to run it non-interactively. All CLI options work with -p, including: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code: claude -p "What does the auth module do?"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Get structured output 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --output-format to control how responses are returned: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Get structured output 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --output-format to control how responses are returned: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
claude -p "Extract the main function names from auth.py" \
  --output-format json \
  --json-schema '{"type":"object","properties":{"functions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["functions"]}'

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Get structured output 3
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --output-format to control how responses are returned: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Extract the text result
claude -p "Summarize this project" --output-format json | jq -r '.result'

# Extract structured output
claude -p "Extract function names from auth.py" \
  --output-format json \
  --json-schema '{"type":"object","properties":{"functions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["functions"]}' \
  | jq '.structured_output'

steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --output-format stream-json with --verbose and --include-partial-messages to receive tokens as they’re generated. Each line is a JSON object representing an event: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Stream responses 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --output-format stream-json with --verbose and --include-partial-messages to receive tokens as they’re generated. Each line is a JSON object representing an event: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:

  jq -rj 'select(.type == "stream_event" and .event.delta.type? == "text_delta") | .event.delta.text'

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Auto-approve tools
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --allowedTools to let Claude use certain tools without prompting. This example runs a test suite and fixes failures, allowing Claude to execute Bash commands and read/edit files without asking for permission: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:

  --allowedTools "Bash,Read,Edit"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Create a commit
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：This example reviews staged changes and creates a commit with an appropriate message: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:

  --allowedTools "Bash(git diff *),Bash(git log *),Bash(git status *),Bash(git commit *)"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Customize the system prompt
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --append-system-prompt to add instructions while keeping Claude Code’s default behavior. This example pipes a PR diff to Claude and instructs it to review for security vulnerabilities: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
gh pr diff "$1" | claude -p \
  --append-system-prompt "You are a security engineer. Review for vulnerabilities." \
  --output-format json

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Continue conversations 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --continue to continue the most recent conversation, or --resume with a session ID to continue a specific conversation. This example runs a review, then sends follow-up prompts: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# First request
claude -p "Review this codebase for performance issues"

# Continue the most recent conversation
claude -p "Now focus on the database queries" --continue
claude -p "Generate a summary of all issues found" --continue

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Continue conversations 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Use --continue to continue the most recent conversation, or --resume with a session ID to continue a specific conversation. This example runs a review, then sends follow-up prompts: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
session_id=$(claude -p "Start a review" --output-format json | jq -r '.session_id')
claude -p "Continue that review" --resume "$session_id"

steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Use --output-format to control how responses are returned: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: Get structured output 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Use --output-format to control how responses are returned: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

  --output-format json \
  --json-schema '{"type":"object","properties":{"functions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["functions"]}' \
  | jq '.structured_output'

mcp.sourceLabel: Connect Claude Code to tools via MCP

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲 MCP，也就是怎么把 Claude Code 接到外部工具和数据源上。
说白了，就是给帮工装外接设备，让它别只盯着眼前这堆文件。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 你可以把 MCP 想成拖拉机后面的挂载口。接上去以后，Claude 才能碰到数据库、接口、知识库、内部工具这些外面的家伙事。
这页最值钱的地方，不是名词本身，而是它会告诉你有哪些接法、哪些现成服务器、该怎么装。
如果你想让 Claude 真正懂你们团队外面的系统，这页几乎绕不过去。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 第一次上 MCP，先挑一个最刚需的外部工具接，不要一口气连十几个。
远程 HTTP、SSE、本地 stdio 这些接法分清楚，再决定走哪条。
接好后先做只读类试验，确认它看得懂、用得稳，再考虑更重的操作。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Option 1: Add a remote HTTP server
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：HTTP servers are the recommended option for connecting to remote MCP servers. This is the most widely supported transport for cloud-based services. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Basic syntax
claude mcp add --transport http <name> <url>

# Real example: Connect to Notion
claude mcp add --transport http notion https://mcp.notion.com/mcp

# Example with Bearer token
claude mcp add --transport http secure-api https://api.example.com/mcp \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Option 2: Add a remote SSE server
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：The SSE (Server-Sent Events) transport is deprecated. Use HTTP servers instead, where available. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Basic syntax
claude mcp add --transport sse <name> <url>

# Real example: Connect to Asana
claude mcp add --transport sse asana https://mcp.asana.com/sse

# Example with authentication header
claude mcp add --transport sse private-api https://api.company.com/sse \
  --header "X-API-Key: your-key-here"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Option 3: Add a local stdio server
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Stdio servers run as local processes on your machine. They’re ideal for tools that need direct system access or custom scripts. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Basic syntax
claude mcp add [options] <name> -- <command> [args...]

# Real example: Add Airtable server
claude mcp add --transport stdio --env AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY airtable \
  -- npx -y airtable-mcp-server

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Managing your servers
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Once configured, you can manage your MCP servers with these commands: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# List all configured servers
claude mcp list

# Get details for a specific server
claude mcp get github

# Remove a server
claude mcp remove github

# (within Claude Code) Check server status
/mcp

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Dynamic tool updates
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Claude Code supports MCP list_changed notifications, allowing MCP servers to dynamically update their available tools, prompts, and resources without requiring you to disconnect and reconnect. When an MCP server sends a list_changed notification, Claude Code automatically refreshes the available capabilities from that server. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# This creates command="cmd" which Windows can execute
claude mcp add --transport stdio my-server -- cmd /c npx -y @some/package

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Plugin-provided MCP servers 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Plugins can bundle MCP servers, automatically providing tools and integrations when the plugin is enabled. Plugin MCP servers work identically to user-configured servers. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Plugin-provided MCP servers 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Plugins can bundle MCP servers, automatically providing tools and integrations when the plugin is enabled. Plugin MCP servers work identically to user-configured servers. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Plugin-provided MCP servers 3
steps.body: 这一步是你直接跟 Claude 说的话。这一小节原文主要在讲：Plugins can bundle MCP servers, automatically providing tools and integrations when the plugin is enabled. Plugin MCP servers work identically to user-configured servers. 下面这块属于“提问示例”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Within Claude Code, see all MCP servers including plugin ones
/mcp

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Local scope
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Local-scoped servers represent the default configuration level and are stored in ~/.claude.json under your project’s path. These servers remain private to you and are only accessible when working within the current project directory. This scope is ideal for personal development servers, experimental configurations, or servers containing sensitive credentials that shouldn’t be shared. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Add a local-scoped server (default)
claude mcp add --transport http stripe https://mcp.stripe.com

# Explicitly specify local scope
claude mcp add --transport http stripe --scope local https://mcp.stripe.com

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Project scope 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Project-scoped servers enable team collaboration by storing configurations in a .mcp.json file at your project’s root directory. This file is designed to be checked into version control, ensuring all team members have access to the same MCP tools and services. When you add a project-scoped server, Claude Code automatically creates or updates this file with the appropriate configuration structure. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Add a project-scoped server
claude mcp add --transport http paypal --scope project https://mcp.paypal.com/mcp

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Project scope 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Project-scoped servers enable team collaboration by storing configurations in a .mcp.json file at your project’s root directory. This file is designed to be checked into version control, ensuring all team members have access to the same MCP tools and services. When you add a project-scoped server, Claude Code automatically creates or updates this file with the appropriate configuration structure. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：User scope
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：User-scoped servers are stored in ~/.claude.json and provide cross-project accessibility, making them available across all projects on your machine while remaining private to your user account. This scope works well for personal utility servers, development tools, or services you frequently use across different projects. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Add a user server
claude mcp add --transport http hubspot --scope user https://mcp.hubspot.com/anthropic

claude mcp add --transport http notion https://mcp.notion.com/mcp

# Example with Bearer token
claude mcp add --transport http secure-api https://api.example.com/mcp \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token"

steps.title: Option 2: Add a remote SSE server
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：The SSE (Server-Sent Events) transport is deprecated. Use HTTP servers instead, where available. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: Option 3: Add a local stdio server
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Stdio servers run as local processes on your machine. They’re ideal for tools that need direct system access or custom scripts. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Basic syntax

# Real example: Add Airtable server
claude mcp add --transport stdio --env AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY airtable \
  -- npx -y airtable-mcp-server

steps.title: Dynamic tool updates

When an MCP server sends a list_changed notification, Claude Code automatically refreshes the available capabilities from that server. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

claude mcp add --transport stdio my-server -- cmd /c npx -y @some/package

sections.title: MCP installation scopes
paragraphs: 这一节讲“MCP installation scopes”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：MCP servers can be configured at three different scope levels, each serving distinct purposes for managing server accessibility and sharing. Understanding these scopes helps you determine the best way to configure servers for your specific needs.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Local scope
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Local scope”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Local-scoped servers represent the default configuration level and are stored in ~/.claude.json under your project’s path. These servers remain private to you and are only accessible when working within the current project directory. This scope is ideal for personal development servers, experimental configurations, or servers containing sensitive credentials that shouldn’t be shared.；The term “local scope” for MCP servers differs from general local settings. MCP local-scoped servers are stored in ~/.claude.json (your home directory), while general local settings use .claude/settings.local.json (in the project directory). See Settings for details on settings file locations.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

steps.title: Local scope
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Local-scoped servers represent the default configuration level and are stored in ~/.claude.json under your project’s path. These servers remain private to you and are only accessible when working within the current project directory. This scope is ideal for personal development servers, experimental configurations, or servers containing sensitive credentials that shouldn’t be shared. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Add a local-scoped server (default)
claude mcp add --transport http stripe https://mcp.stripe.com

# Explicitly specify local scope
claude mcp add --transport http stripe --scope local https://mcp.stripe.com

sections.title: Project scope
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Project scope”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

steps.title: Project scope 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Project-scoped servers enable team collaboration by storing configurations in a .mcp.json file at your project’s root directory. This file is designed to be checked into version control, ensuring all team members have access to the same MCP tools and services. When you add a project-scoped server, Claude Code automatically creates or updates this file with the appropriate configuration structure. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Add a project-scoped server
claude mcp add --transport http paypal --scope project https://mcp.paypal.com/mcp

steps.title: Project scope 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一节原文主要在讲：Project-scoped servers enable team collaboration by storing configurations in a .mcp.json file at your project’s root directory. This file is designed to be checked into version control, ensuring all team members have access to the same MCP tools and services. When you add a project-scoped server, Claude Code automatically creates or updates this file with the appropriate configuration structure. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

sections.title: User scope
paragraphs: 这一节讲“User scope”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：User-scoped servers are stored in ~/.claude.json and provide cross-project accessibility, making them available across all projects on your machine while remaining private to your user account. This scope works well for personal utility servers, development tools, or services you frequently use across different projects.。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

steps.title: User scope
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：User-scoped servers are stored in ~/.claude.json and provide cross-project accessibility, making them available across all projects on your machine while remaining private to your user account. This scope works well for personal utility servers, development tools, or services you frequently use across different projects. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:

claude mcp add --transport http hubspot --scope user https://mcp.hubspot.com/anthropic

sections.title: Choosing the right scope
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Choosing the right scope”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Select your scope based on:；Local scope: Personal servers, experimental configurations, or sensitive credentials specific to one project；Project scope: Team-shared servers, project-specific tools, or services required for collaboration。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Scope hierarchy and precedence
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Scope hierarchy and precedence”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：MCP server configurations follow a clear precedence hierarchy. When servers with the same name exist at multiple scopes, the system resolves conflicts by prioritizing local-scoped servers first, followed by project-scoped servers, and finally user-scoped servers. This design ensures that personal configurations can override shared ones when needed.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Use a fixed OAuth callback port
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Use a fixed OAuth callback port”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Some MCP servers require a specific redirect URI registered in advance. By default, Claude Code picks a random available port for the OAuth callback. Use --callback-port to fix the port so it matches a pre-registered redirect URI of the form http://localhost:PORT/callback.；You can use --callback-port on its own (with dynamic client registration) or together with --client-id (with pre-configured credentials).。
如果你打算把子能力往里挂，这里提到的 hooks、MCP、skills、memory 都要分清各自负责哪一摊。

steps.title: Use a fixed OAuth callback port
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Some MCP servers require a specific redirect URI registered in advance. By default, Claude Code picks a random available port for the OAuth callback. Use --callback-port to fix the port so it matches a pre-registered redirect URI of the form http://localhost:PORT/callback. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Fixed callback port with dynamic client registration
claude mcp add --transport http \
  --callback-port 8080 \
  my-server https://mcp.example.com/mcp

sections.title: Use pre-configured OAuth credentials
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Use pre-configured OAuth credentials”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Register an OAuth app with the server；Create an app through the server’s developer portal and note your client ID and client secret.；Add the server with your credentials。
如果你打算把子能力往里挂，这里提到的 hooks、MCP、skills、memory 都要分清各自负责哪一摊。

steps.title: Use pre-configured OAuth credentials 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Some MCP servers don’t support automatic OAuth setup. If you see an error like “Incompatible auth server: does not support dynamic client registration,” the server requires pre-configured credentials. Register an OAuth app through the server’s developer portal first, then provide the credentials when adding the server. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
claude mcp add --transport http \
  --client-id your-client-id --client-secret --callback-port 8080 \
  my-server https://mcp.example.com/mcp

steps.title: Use pre-configured OAuth credentials 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Some MCP servers don’t support automatic OAuth setup. If you see an error like “Incompatible auth server: does not support dynamic client registration,” the server requires pre-configured credentials. Register an OAuth app through the server’s developer portal first, then provide the credentials when adding the server. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: Use pre-configured OAuth credentials 3
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Some MCP servers don’t support automatic OAuth setup. If you see an error like “Incompatible auth server: does not support dynamic client registration,” the server requires pre-configured credentials. Register an OAuth app through the server’s developer portal first, then provide the credentials when adding the server. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: Use pre-configured OAuth credentials 4

If you see an error like “Incompatible auth server: does not support dynamic client registration,” the server requires pre-configured credentials. steps.title: Add MCP servers from JSON configuration 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一节原文主要在讲：If you have a JSON configuration for an MCP server, you can add it directly: 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Basic syntax
claude mcp add-json <name> '<json>'

# Example: Adding an HTTP server with JSON configuration
claude mcp add-json weather-api '{"type":"http","url":"https://api.weather.com/mcp","headers":{"Authorization":"Bearer token"}}'

# Example: Adding a stdio server with JSON configuration
claude mcp add-json local-weather '{"type":"stdio","command":"/path/to/weather-cli","args":["--api-key","abc123"],"env":{"CACHE_DIR":"/tmp"}}'

# Example: Adding an HTTP server with pre-configured OAuth credentials
claude mcp add-json my-server '{"type":"http","url":"https://mcp.example.com/mcp","oauth":{"clientId":"your-client-id","callbackPort":8080}}' --client-secret

illustration.title: 一眼看懂这一页
lines: 这是 Build with Claude Code 里的一摊要紧活
illustration.caption: 先把这页到底在讲什么看明白，再去碰具体命令和配置，最不容易绕晕。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲常见故障怎么排。
装不上、连不通、命令不认、路径不对，这里基本都有思路。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 排错最怕瞎试，这页就是给你一张“先查哪儿、后查哪儿”的路线图。
它会带你先查安装本身、再查网络、再查 PATH、再查有没有冲突安装或权限问题。
真卡住时，这页往往比四处乱搜省时间。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先把报错原文、系统环境、你刚做的操作记下来。
从最基础的通路开始查，比如 PATH、网络、目录权限。
别一上来全盘重装，能小步验证就小步验证。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Check network connectivity 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：The installer downloads from storage.googleapis.com. Verify you can reach it: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Check network connectivity 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：The installer downloads from storage.googleapis.com. Verify you can reach it: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
export HTTP_PROXY=http://proxy.example.com:8080
export HTTPS_PROXY=http://proxy.example.com:8080
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Verify your PATH 1
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：If installation succeeded but you get a command not found or not recognized error when running claude, the install directory isn’t in your PATH. Your shell searches for programs in directories listed in PATH, and the installer places claude at ~/.local/bin/claude on macOS/Linux or %USERPROFILE%\.local\bin\claude.exe on Windows. 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Verify your PATH 2
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：If installation succeeded but you get a command not found or not recognized error when running claude, the install directory isn’t in your PATH. Your shell searches for programs in directories listed in PATH, and the installer places claude at ~/.local/bin/claude on macOS/Linux or %USERPROFILE%\.local\bin\claude.exe on Windows. 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Zsh (macOS default)
echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.zshrc
source ~/.zshrc

# Bash (Linux default)
echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc
source ~/.bashrc

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Verify your PATH 3
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：If installation succeeded but you get a command not found or not recognized error when running claude, the install directory isn’t in your PATH. Your shell searches for programs in directories listed in PATH, and the installer places claude at ~/.local/bin/claude on macOS/Linux or %USERPROFILE%\.local\bin\claude.exe on Windows. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: curl: (56) Failure writing output to destination 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：The curl ... | bash command downloads the script and passes it directly to Bash for execution using a pipe (|). Common causes include network interruptions, the download being blocked mid-stream, or system resource limits. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

lines: 这是 Build with Claude Code 里的一摊要紧活
illustration.caption: 先把这页到底在讲什么看明白，再去碰具体命令和配置，最不容易绕晕。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲企业部署总览，也就是 Claude Code 怎么接不同云、代理和企业基础设施。
它不是单一配置页，更像给你先画一张大地图。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像你准备把一套设备搬去不同村口、不同仓库、不同电路环境里用，先得看哪条路最适合自己。
这一页会先比较几种部署路子，再讲代理、网关，以及 AWS、Azure、GCP 这些不同云的接法。
如果你不是个人随手用，而是团队或企业要上，这页最好先看。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先搞清你们更在意的是账号体系、网络环境、合规，还是现有云平台绑定。
不要一上来就钻某一朵云的细节，先用总览页判断大方向。
看完这页后，再去对应的 Bedrock、Vertex、Foundry、网关和网络配置分页面。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Most organizations can use a cloud provider directly without additional configuration. However, you may need to configure a corporate proxy or LLM gateway if your organization has specific network or management requirements. These are different configurations that can be used together:；Corporate proxy: Routes traffic through an HTTP/HTTPS proxy. Use this if your organization requires all outbound traffic to pass through a proxy server for security monitoring, compliance, or network policy enforcement. Configure with the HTTPS_PROXY or HTTP_PROXY environment variables. Learn more in Enterprise network configuration.。

Check Claude’s suggestions and give feedback if it’s off-track. Over time, as users understand this new paradigm better, then they’ll be more effective at letting Claude Code run more agentically.。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：If you deploy through Bedrock, Vertex AI, or Foundry, pin specific model versions using ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL, and ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL. Without pinning, Claude Code aliases resolve to the latest version, which can break users when Anthropic releases a new model that isn’t yet enabled in your account. See Model configuration for details.。
这里还牵扯模型怎么选，速度、成本和能力通常要一起掂量。

Learn more.；At Anthropic, we trust Claude Code to power development across every Anthropic codebase. We hope you enjoy using Claude Code as much as we do.。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲怎么通过 Amazon Bedrock 接 Claude Code。
适合本来就扎在 AWS 体系里的团队。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像你本来就住在 AWS 这条大路边上，那最省事的办法就是顺着现成道路走。
这一页会讲前提条件、实际配置步骤、IAM 凭证这些硬东西。
如果你们公司的账号、网络、审计都在 AWS 上，这页很可能是主路。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先把先决条件看清，再去配凭证和权限。
IAM 这块不要想当然，角色和权限边界最好提前捋顺。
卡住时先查账户、区域、凭证，再去看工具本身。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：3. Configure Claude Code
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：Set the following environment variables to enable Bedrock: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Enable Bedrock integration
export CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK=1
export AWS_REGION=us-east-1  # or your preferred region

# Optional: Override the region for the small/fast model (Haiku)
export ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL_AWS_REGION=us-west-2

steps.title: 原页关键片段：4. Pin model versions 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Pin specific model versions for every deployment. If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t available in your Bedrock account, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：4. Pin model versions 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Pin specific model versions for every deployment. If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t available in your Bedrock account, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Using inference profile ID
export ANTHROPIC_MODEL='global.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6'
export ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL='us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0'

# Using application inference profile ARN
export ANTHROPIC_MODEL='arn:aws:bedrock:us-east-2:your-account-id:application-inference-profile/your-model-id'

# Optional: Disable prompt caching if needed
export DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING=1

steps.title: 原页关键片段：4. Pin model versions 3
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Pin specific model versions for every deployment. If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t available in your Bedrock account, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Amazon Bedrock Guardrails let you implement content filtering for Claude Code. Create a Guardrail in the Amazon Bedrock console, publish a version, then add the Guardrail headers to your settings file. Enable Cross-Region inference on your Guardrail if you’re using cross-region inference profiles. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 4. Pin model versions 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Pin specific model versions for every deployment. If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t available in your Bedrock account, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 4. Pin model versions 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Pin specific model versions for every deployment. If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t available in your Bedrock account, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Using inference profile ID
export ANTHROPIC_MODEL='global.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6'
export ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL='us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0'

# Using application inference profile ARN
export ANTHROPIC_MODEL='arn:aws:bedrock:us-east-2:your-account-id:application-inference-profile/your-model-id'

# Optional: Disable prompt caching if needed
export DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING=1

google-vertex-ai.sourceLabel: Claude Code on Google Vertex AI

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲怎么通过 Google Vertex AI 接 Claude Code。
适合本来就把很多事放在 GCP 上的团队。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 如果你们家底子本来就在 Google 云上，那走 Vertex 就像走熟路，不用临时再修旁门。
这一页会讲区域、API、凭证和整体接入步骤。
对 GCP 团队来说，这比另起一套体系更自然。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先确认区域和服务开关，再去配身份和调用。
Google 云里很多前提条件都要先开服务，不要跳步。
卡住时先查项目配置和 IAM，再查 Claude Code 这层。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：1. Enable Vertex AI API
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Enable the Vertex AI API in your GCP project: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Set your project ID
gcloud config set project YOUR-PROJECT-ID

# Enable Vertex AI API
gcloud services enable aiplatform.googleapis.com

steps.title: 原页关键片段：4. Configure Claude Code
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：Set the following environment variables: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Enable Vertex AI integration
export CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX=1
export CLOUD_ML_REGION=global
export ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID=YOUR-PROJECT-ID

# Optional: Disable prompt caching if needed
export DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING=1

# When CLOUD_ML_REGION=global, override region for unsupported models
export VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_3_5_HAIKU=us-east5

# Optional: Override regions for other specific models
export VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_3_5_SONNET=us-east5
export VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_3_7_SONNET=us-east5
export VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_4_0_OPUS=europe-west1
export VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_4_0_SONNET=us-east5
export VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_4_1_OPUS=europe-west1

If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t enabled in your Vertex AI project, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲怎么通过 Microsoft Foundry 或 Azure 那条路接 Claude Code。
适合本来就在微软云体系里做事的团队。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像你本来就用 Azure 这套仓库和账本，那顺着原来的门禁和钥匙走最省事。
这页会讲前提条件、资源准备和 Azure 凭证配置。
企业里最常见的问题不一定是步骤复杂，而是权限没对齐。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先把订阅、资源、凭证这些前提打通，再去跑 Claude Code。
Foundry 资源先准备好，别边配边找目标资源。
真卡住时，优先查 Azure 身份和访问权。

export CLAUDE_CODE_USE_FOUNDRY=1

# Azure resource name (replace {resource} with your resource name)
export ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_RESOURCE={resource}
# Or provide the full base URL:
# export ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_BASE_URL=https://{resource}.services.ai.azure.com/anthropic

steps.title: 原页关键片段：4. Pin model versions
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Pin specific model versions for every deployment. If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t available in your Foundry account, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. When you create Azure deployments, select a specific model version rather than “auto-update to latest.” 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 3. Configure Claude Code
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一节原文主要在讲：Set the following environment variables to enable Microsoft Foundry: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Enable Microsoft Foundry integration
export CLAUDE_CODE_USE_FOUNDRY=1

# Azure resource name (replace {resource} with your resource name)
export ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_RESOURCE={resource}
# Or provide the full base URL:
# export ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_BASE_URL=https://{resource}.services.ai.azure.com/anthropic

steps.title: 4. Pin model versions
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：Pin specific model versions for every deployment. If you use model aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) without pinning, Claude Code may attempt to use a newer model version that isn’t available in your Foundry account, breaking existing users when Anthropic releases updates. When you create Azure deployments, select a specific model version rather than “auto-update to latest.” 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲网络配置，适合公司内网、代理、防火墙比较严格的环境。
很多“明明家里能跑，公司跑不动”的问题，都在这页。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像门口有门卫、有通行证、有出门路线，不是你想出去就能直接出去。
这一页最关键的是把代理、证书、白名单、出网限制这些门道讲清。
如果 Claude Code 一直连不上、超时、拉不到服务，这页往往就是答案。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先弄清你们是走代理、白名单，还是干脆有出网限制。
网络问题别只盯客户端，很多时候得和 IT 或平台同事一起看。
先查最基础的通路，再去怀疑更高层的配置。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Environment variables
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：Claude Code respects standard proxy environment variables: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# HTTPS proxy (recommended)
export HTTPS_PROXY=https://proxy.example.com:8080

# HTTP proxy (if HTTPS not available)
export HTTP_PROXY=http://proxy.example.com:8080

# Bypass proxy for specific requests - space-separated format
export NO_PROXY="localhost 192.168.1.1 example.com .example.com"
# Bypass proxy for specific requests - comma-separated format
export NO_PROXY="localhost,192.168.1.1,example.com,.example.com"
# Bypass proxy for all requests
export NO_PROXY="*"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Basic authentication
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：If your proxy requires basic authentication, include credentials in the proxy URL: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Custom CA certificates
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：If your enterprise environment uses custom CAs for HTTPS connections (whether through a proxy or direct API access), configure Claude Code to trust them: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：mTLS authentication
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：For enterprise environments requiring client certificate authentication: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Client certificate for authentication
export CLAUDE_CODE_CLIENT_CERT=/path/to/client-cert.pem

# Client private key
export CLAUDE_CODE_CLIENT_KEY=/path/to/client-key.pem

# Optional: Passphrase for encrypted private key
export CLAUDE_CODE_CLIENT_KEY_PASSPHRASE="your-passphrase"

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲 LLM 网关，适合多团队共用、要统一认证审计限流的场景。
它不是人人都要，但团队一大往往就绕不开。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 你可以把网关想成总闸口。所有请求都先从这儿过，再统一分发、记账、限流、审计。
这页会讲网关要满足什么条件、怎么配置认证、怎么选模型、不同提供方怎么接。
如果你们想把 Claude Code 纳入统一管控，这页很重要。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先确认你们是不是真的需要集中闸口，不是为了看起来高级才上。
认证、模型选择和 provider 端点要一层层对齐，不要混着猜。
真有多团队共用场景，就把这页和成本、监控一起看。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Basic LiteLLM setup 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Configure Claude Code: 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Basic LiteLLM setup 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Configure Claude Code: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
#!/bin/bash
# ~/bin/get-litellm-key.sh

# Example: Fetch key from vault
vault kv get -field=api_key secret/litellm/claude-code

# Example: Generate JWT token
jwt encode \
  --secret="${JWT_SECRET}" \
  --exp="+1h" \
  '{"user":"'${USER}'","team":"engineering"}'

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲开发容器，也就是给团队准备一套更一致、更安全的 Claude Code 环境。
适合环境复杂、成员多、总碰到“在我机器上能跑”的团队。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像给大家统一发同一套工具箱和工作台，谁来都别差太多。
这一页会讲容器方案的特点、四步上手、配置拆解和安全设计。
如果你们团队环境老是各不相同，这页很值。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先按最小 devcontainer 方案跑通，再逐步加团队自己的东西。
重点不只是能启动，还要看权限、挂载和工具链是不是都准备对了。
容器这条路适合想把环境差异压到最低的团队。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲高级安装和管理员起步，不是普通新手第一分钟就得看的页。
它主要管机器要求、不同系统怎么装、怎么升级、怎么卸、怎么认主。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像在正式开工前先把机器、燃料、工具箱和钥匙都备齐。
这一页会讲系统要求、额外依赖、Windows 怎么配、装完怎么验证、怎么认证、怎么更新版本。
如果你装到一半卡住，或者团队要统一装机，这页就很重要。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先看自己机器够不够条件，再选对应系统的安装路子。
装完一定要做验证和认证，不要看到命令装上就以为万事大吉。
如果团队多人装机，最好统一版本和发布通道，别每个人一套。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude Code requires a Pro, Max, Teams, Enterprise, or Console account. The free Claude.ai plan does not include Claude Code access. You can also use Claude Code with a third-party API provider like Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, or Microsoft Foundry.；After installing, log in by running claude and following the browser prompts. See Authentication for all account types and team setup options.。

sections.title: Update Claude Code
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Update Claude Code”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Native installations automatically update in the background. You can configure the release channel to control whether you receive updates immediately or on a delayed stable schedule, or disable auto-updates entirely. Homebrew and WinGet installations require manual updates.。

steps.title: Deprecated npm installation 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一节原文主要在讲：npm installation is deprecated. The native installer is faster, requires no dependencies, and auto-updates in the background. Use the native installation method when possible. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Install the native binary
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

# Remove the old npm installation
npm uninstall -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

steps.title: Remove configuration files 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一节原文主要在讲：Removing configuration files will delete all your settings, allowed tools, MCP server configurations, and session history. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Remove user settings and state
rm -rf ~/.claude
rm ~/.claude.json

# Remove project-specific settings (run from your project directory)
rm -rf .claude
rm -f .mcp.json

steps.title: Remove configuration files 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一节原文主要在讲：Removing configuration files will delete all your settings, allowed tools, MCP server configurations, and session history. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Remove user settings and state
Remove-Item -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude" -Recurse -Force
Remove-Item -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude.json" -Force

# Remove project-specific settings (run from your project directory)
Remove-Item -Path ".claude" -Recurse -Force
Remove-Item -Path ".mcp.json" -Force

illustration.title: 一眼看懂这一页
lines: 这是 Administration 里的一摊要紧活

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲的是怎么让 Claude Code 认你、认团队、认组织。
个人怎么登录，团队怎么统一接，这里都会讲。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这事就像进仓库前先认身份。你是谁、属于哪一队、能开哪道门，先对上号，后面干活才顺。
这页不只是个人登录，还会讲团队认证和企业接法。
如果登录这一步没理顺，后面很多功能都会卡在门口。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 个人先把最基础的登录跑通，再去碰团队或企业认证。
团队接入时，先确认账号体系和权限体系是谁说了算。
认证相关问题一旦出错，先查登录方式、组织归属和令牌来源。

sections.title: Log in to Claude Code
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Log in to Claude Code”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：You can authenticate with any of these account types:；Claude Pro or Max subscription: log in with your Claude.ai account. Subscribe at claude.com/pricing.；Claude for Teams or Enterprise: log in with the Claude.ai account your team admin invited you to.。

sections.title: Set up team authentication

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：For teams and organizations, you can configure Claude Code access in one of these ways:；Claude for Teams or Enterprise, recommended for most teams；Claude Console。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Subscribe；Subscribe to Claude for Teams or contact sales for Claude for Enterprise.；Invite team members。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：For organizations that prefer API-based billing, you can set up access through the Claude Console.；Create or use a Console account；Use your existing Claude Console account or create a new one.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：For teams using Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, or Microsoft Foundry:；Follow provider setup；Follow the Bedrock docs, Vertex docs, or Microsoft Foundry docs.。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Credential management
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Credential management”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude Code securely manages your authentication credentials:；Storage location: on macOS, credentials are stored in the encrypted macOS Keychain.；Custom credential scripts: the apiKeyHelper setting can be configured to run a shell script that returns an API key.。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲安全，不是吓人，是教你怎么把风险挡在外面。
越早把安全边界画清楚，后面越少返工。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 安全就像修院墙、安门锁，不是等出事了才想起来补。
Claude Code 能干活，就意味着你更要提前定好它能接触什么、不能带走什么。
这页适合管理员和团队负责人先看一遍，再决定默认规则。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先从最基本的权限、认证、数据边界看起。
别把安全理解成只跟管理员有关，普通使用方式也会影响风险。
越是多人共用环境，越要先立规矩，再大规模开用。

sections.title: Security foundation
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Security foundation”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Your code’s security is paramount. Claude Code is built with security at its core, developed according to Anthropic’s comprehensive security program. Learn more and access resources (SOC 2 Type 2 report, ISO 27001 certificate, etc.) at Anthropic Trust Center.。

sections.title: Permission-based architecture
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Permission-based architecture”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：For detailed permission configuration, see Permissions.。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Built-in protections
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Built-in protections”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：To mitigate risks in agentic systems:；Accept Edits mode: Batch accept multiple edits while maintaining permission prompts for commands with side effects。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: User responsibility
paragraphs: 这一节讲“User responsibility”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude Code only has the permissions you grant it. You’re responsible for reviewing proposed code and commands for safety before approval.。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Protect against prompt injection
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Protect against prompt injection”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Prompt injection is a technique where an attacker attempts to override or manipulate an AI assistant’s instructions by inserting malicious text. Claude Code includes several safeguards against these attacks:。

sections.title: Core protections
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Core protections”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Permission system: Sensitive operations require explicit approval；Context-aware analysis: Detects potentially harmful instructions by analyzing the full request；Input sanitization: Prevents command injection by processing user inputs。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Privacy safeguards
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Privacy safeguards”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：We have implemented several safeguards to protect your data, including:；Limited retention periods for sensitive information (see the Privacy Center to learn more)；Restricted access to user session data。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Additional safeguards
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Additional safeguards”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Network request approval: Tools that make network requests require user approval by default；Isolated context windows: Web fetch uses a separate context window to avoid injecting potentially malicious prompts；Note: Trust verification is disabled when running non-interactively with the -p flag。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: MCP security
paragraphs: 这一节讲“MCP security”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude Code allows users to configure Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. The list of allowed MCP servers is configured in your source code, as part of Claude Code settings engineers check into source control.；We encourage either writing your own MCP servers or using MCP servers from providers that you trust. You are able to configure Claude Code permissions for MCP servers. Anthropic does not manage or audit any MCP servers.。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: IDE security
paragraphs: 这一节讲“IDE security”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：See VS Code security and privacy for more information on running Claude Code in an IDE.。

sections.title: Cloud execution security
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Cloud execution security”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：When using Claude Code on the web, additional security controls are in place:；Isolated virtual machines: Each cloud session runs in an isolated, Anthropic-managed VM；Branch restrictions: Git push operations are restricted to the current working branch。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Working with sensitive code
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Working with sensitive code”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Review all suggested changes before approval；Use project-specific permission settings for sensitive repositories；Consider using devcontainers for additional isolation。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Team security
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Team security”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Use managed settings to enforce organizational standards；Share approved permission configurations through version control；Train team members on security best practices。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Reporting security issues
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Reporting security issues”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：If you discover a security vulnerability in Claude Code:；Do not disclose it publicly；Report it through our HackerOne program。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Related resources
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Related resources”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Sandboxing - Filesystem and network isolation for bash commands；Permissions - Configure permissions and access controls；Monitoring usage - Track and audit Claude Code activity。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

illustration.caption: 先把这页到底在讲什么看明白，再去碰具体命令和配置，最不容易绕晕。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲的是由服务器统一下发配置，不让每个人各配各的。
适合团队想把规矩一次定好、大家一起照着走。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像村里统一贴规矩，不是每家院门上各写一套。
好处是团队口径一致，少了“我这台机器不是这么配的”这类麻烦。
尤其适合企业或多人协作环境。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先分清哪些是团队硬规则，哪些还该留给个人调。
统一下发前最好先小范围试，别一下把全队都锁死。
写服务器托管设置时，宁可少而准，也别又长又乱。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Configure server-managed settings
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Open the admin console 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

sections.title: Requirements
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Requirements”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：To use server-managed settings, you need:；Claude for Teams or Claude for Enterprise plan；Claude Code version 2.1.38 or later for Claude for Teams, or version 2.1.30 or later for Claude for Enterprise。

sections.title: Choose between server-managed and endpoint-managed settings
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Choose between server-managed and endpoint-managed settings”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude Code supports two approaches for centralized configuration. Server-managed settings deliver configuration from Anthropic’s servers. Endpoint-managed settings are deployed directly to devices through native OS policies (macOS managed preferences, Windows registry) or managed settings files.；If your devices are enrolled in an MDM or endpoint management solution, endpoint-managed settings provide stronger security guarantees because the settings file can be protected from user modification at the OS level.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Configure server-managed settings
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Configure server-managed settings”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Open the admin console；In Claude.ai, navigate to Admin Settings > Claude Code > Managed settings.；Define your settings。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

steps.title: Configure server-managed settings
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一节原文主要在讲：Open the admin console 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

sections.title: Verify settings delivery
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Verify settings delivery”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：To confirm that settings are being applied, ask a user to restart Claude Code. If the configuration includes settings that trigger the security approval dialog, the user sees a prompt describing the managed settings on startup. You can also verify that managed permission rules are active by having a user run /permissions to view their effective permission rules.。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Access control
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Access control”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：The following roles can manage server-managed settings:；Primary Owner；Restrict access to trusted personnel, as settings changes apply to all users in the organization.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Current limitations
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Current limitations”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Server-managed settings have the following limitations during the beta period:；Settings apply uniformly to all users in the organization. Per-group configurations are not yet supported.；MCP server configurations cannot be distributed through server-managed settings.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Settings precedence
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Settings precedence”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Server-managed settings and endpoint-managed settings both occupy the highest tier in the Claude Code settings hierarchy. No other settings level can override them, including command line arguments. When both are present, server-managed settings take precedence and endpoint-managed settings are not used.。

sections.title: Fetch and caching behavior
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Fetch and caching behavior”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude Code fetches settings from Anthropic’s servers at startup and polls for updates hourly during active sessions.；First launch without cached settings:；Claude Code fetches settings asynchronously。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Security approval dialogs
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Security approval dialogs”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Certain settings that could pose security risks require explicit user approval before being applied:；Shell command settings: settings that execute shell commands；Custom environment variables: variables not in the known safe allowlist。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Platform availability
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Platform availability”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Amazon Bedrock；Google Vertex AI；Microsoft Foundry。
这里还牵扯模型怎么选，速度、成本和能力通常要一起掂量。

sections.title: Audit logging
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Audit logging”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Audit log events for settings changes are available through the compliance API or audit log export. Contact your Anthropic account team for access.；Audit events include the type of action performed, the account and device that performed the action, and references to the previous and new values.。

sections.title: Security considerations
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Security considerations”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。
原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：For stronger enforcement guarantees, use endpoint-managed settings on devices enrolled in an MDM solution.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: See also
paragraphs: 这一节讲“See also”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Related pages for managing Claude Code configuration:；Settings: complete configuration reference including all available settings；Endpoint-managed settings: managed settings deployed to devices by IT。

illustration.title: 一眼看懂这一页
lines: 这是 Administration 里的一摊要紧活
illustration.caption: 先把这页到底在讲什么看明白，再去碰具体命令和配置，最不容易绕晕。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲数据怎么被使用，适合对合规和隐私比较敏感的人看。
看完这页，心里要清楚数据会经过哪几道手。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 很多人最担心的不是它会不会干活，而是它碰过的数据到底怎么处理。
这页就是把这类问题摊开讲：哪些数据会进流程，哪些边界要特别注意。
如果团队对数据要求高，这页基本是必看项。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先看清楚“会收什么”“不会收什么”“保留多久”。
不要凭感觉猜，数据问题最好按文档和团队要求逐项核对。
真有高要求场景，就连零数据保留那页一起看。

sections.title: Data training policy
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Data training policy”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Consumer users (Free, Pro, and Max plans): We give you the choice to allow your data to be used to improve future Claude models. We will train new models using data from Free, Pro, and Max accounts when this setting is on (including when you use Claude Code from these accounts).；Commercial users: (Team and Enterprise plans, API, 3rd-party platforms, and Claude Gov) maintain existing policies: Anthropic does not train generative models using code or prompts sent to Claude Code under commercial terms, unless the customer has chosen to provide their data to us for model improvement (for example, the Developer Partner Program).。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Development Partner Program
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Development Partner Program”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：If you explicitly opt in to methods to provide us with materials to train on, such as via the Development Partner Program, we may use those materials provided to train our models. An organization admin can expressly opt-in to the Development Partner Program for their organization. Note that this program is available only for Anthropic first-party API, and not for Bedrock or Vertex users.。
这里还牵扯模型怎么选，速度、成本和能力通常要一起掂量。

sections.title: Feedback using the /bug command
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Feedback using the /bug command”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：If you choose to send us feedback about Claude Code using the /bug command, we may use your feedback to improve our products and services. Transcripts shared via /bug are retained for 5 years.。

sections.title: Session quality surveys
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Session quality surveys”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：When you see the “How is Claude doing this session?” prompt in Claude Code, responding to this survey (including selecting “Dismiss”), only your numeric rating (1, 2, 3, or dismiss) is recorded. We do not collect or store any conversation transcripts, inputs, outputs, or other session data as part of this survey. Unlike thumbs up/down feedback or /bug reports, this session quality survey is a simple product satisfaction metric. Your responses to this survey do not impact your data training preferences and cannot be used to train our AI models.；To disable these surveys, set CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY=1. The survey is also disabled when DISABLE_TELEMETRY or CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC is set. To control frequency instead of disabling, set feedbackSurveyRate in your settings file to a probability between 0 and 1.。
这里还牵扯模型怎么选，速度、成本和能力通常要一起掂量。

sections.title: Data retention
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Data retention”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Anthropic retains Claude Code data based on your account type and preferences.；Consumer users (Free, Pro, and Max plans):；Users who don’t allow data use for model improvement: 30-day retention period。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: Data access
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Data access”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：For all first party users, you can learn more about what data is logged for local Claude Code and remote Claude Code. Remote Control sessions follow the local data flow since all execution happens on your machine. Note for remote Claude Code, Claude accesses the repository where you initiate your Claude Code session. Claude does not access repositories that you have connected but have not started a session in.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Local Claude Code: Data flow and dependencies
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Local Claude Code: Data flow and dependencies”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：The diagram below shows how Claude Code connects to external services during installation and normal operation. Solid lines indicate required connections, while dashed lines represent optional or user-initiated data flows.；Claude Code is installed from NPM. Claude Code runs locally. In order to interact with the LLM, Claude Code sends data over the network. This data includes all user prompts and model outputs. The data is encrypted in transit via TLS and is not encrypted at rest. Claude Code is compatible with most popular VPNs and LLM proxies.。
这里还牵扯模型怎么选，速度、成本和能力通常要一起掂量。

sections.title: Cloud execution: Data flow and dependencies
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Cloud execution: Data flow and dependencies”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Credentials: GitHub authentication is handled through a secure proxy; your GitHub credentials never enter the sandbox；Network traffic: All outbound traffic goes through a security proxy for audit logging and abuse prevention；Session data: Prompts, code changes, and outputs follow the same data policies as local Claude Code usage。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Telemetry services
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Telemetry services”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude Code connects from users’ machines to the Statsig service to log operational metrics such as latency, reliability, and usage patterns. This logging does not include any code or file paths. Data is encrypted in transit using TLS and at rest using 256-bit AES encryption. Read more in the Statsig security documentation. To opt out of Statsig telemetry, set the DISABLE_TELEMETRY environment variable.；Claude Code connects from users’ machines to Sentry for operational error logging. The data is encrypted in transit using TLS and at rest using 256-bit AES encryption. Read more in the Sentry security documentation. To opt out of error logging, set the DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING environment variable.。
这一段尤其要盯工具和权限边界，别为了省事一把全开。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲零数据保留，适合对数据残留非常敏感的场景。
说白了，就是尽量不让材料在系统里留下尾巴。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像借工具干活，但干完不把你家的账本抄走。
对金融、政企、合规要求很严的团队，这通常不是可选项。
这页会帮助你判断自己是不是需要这套更严格的模式。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先确认你们团队是不是有明确的零保留要求。
别只看名字就以为万事大吉，具体边界还是要一条条核对。
通常要和认证、权限、数据使用几页一起看。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲怎么盯团队使用情况，看看谁在用、怎么用、用得多不多。
不是为了盯人，而是为了心里有账。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像看仓库出入账。你不一定要天天盯，但总得知道粮食去哪了。
对团队来说，监控使用情况能帮助你发现浪费、卡点和高频需求。
没有这些数，后面谈优化和控成本都容易拍脑袋。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先看最关键的几项：活跃度、用量、异常峰值。
别收一堆数据却不看，监控的价值在于拿来做决策。
如果目标是控成本，就把这页和 Costs 一起看。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Quick start
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Configure OpenTelemetry using environment variables: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# 1. Enable telemetry
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1

# 2. Choose exporters (both are optional - configure only what you need)
export OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER=otlp       # Options: otlp, prometheus, console
export OTEL_LOGS_EXPORTER=otlp          # Options: otlp, console

# 3. Configure OTLP endpoint (for OTLP exporter)
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL=grpc
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:4317

# 4. Set authentication (if required)
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS="Authorization=Bearer your-token"

# 5. For debugging: reduce export intervals
export OTEL_METRIC_EXPORT_INTERVAL=10000  # 10 seconds (default: 60000ms)
export OTEL_LOGS_EXPORT_INTERVAL=5000     # 5 seconds (default: 5000ms)

# 6. Run Claude Code
claude

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Administrator configuration
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Administrators can configure OpenTelemetry settings for all users through the managed settings file. This allows for centralized control of telemetry settings across an organization. See the settings precedence for more information about how settings are applied. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：For enterprise environments that require dynamic authentication, you can configure a script to generate headers dynamically: 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：For enterprise environments that require dynamic authentication, you can configure a script to generate headers dynamically: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Multi-team organization support 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Organizations with multiple teams or departments can add custom attributes to distinguish between different groups using the OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES environment variable: 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Add custom attributes for team identification
export OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES="department=engineering,team.id=platform,cost_center=eng-123"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Multi-team organization support 2
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：Organizations with multiple teams or departments can add custom attributes to distinguish between different groups using the OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES environment variable: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# ❌ Invalid - contains spaces
export OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES="org.name=John's Organization"

# ✅ Valid - use underscores or camelCase instead
export OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES="org.name=Johns_Organization"
export OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES="org.name=JohnsOrganization"

# ✅ Valid - percent-encode special characters if needed
export OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES="org.name=John%27s%20Organization"

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Example configurations
steps.body: 这一步是原页里的关键代码或示例。这一小节原文主要在讲：Set these environment variables before running claude. Each block shows a complete configuration for a different exporter or deployment scenario: 下面这块属于“代码片段”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
# Console debugging (1-second intervals)
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1
export OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER=console
export OTEL_METRIC_EXPORT_INTERVAL=1000

# OTLP/gRPC
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1
export OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER=otlp
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL=grpc
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:4317

# Prometheus
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1
export OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER=prometheus

# Multiple exporters
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1
export OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER=console,otlp
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL=http/json

# Different endpoints/backends for metrics and logs
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1
export OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER=otlp
export OTEL_LOGS_EXPORTER=otlp
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_PROTOCOL=http/protobuf
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_ENDPOINT=http://metrics.example.com:4318
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_LOGS_PROTOCOL=grpc
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_LOGS_ENDPOINT=http://logs.example.com:4317

# Metrics only (no events/logs)
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1
export OTEL_METRICS_EXPORTER=otlp
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL=grpc
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:4317

# Events/logs only (no metrics)
export CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1
export OTEL_LOGS_EXPORTER=otlp
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_PROTOCOL=grpc
export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:4317

paragraphs: 这页讲钱从哪花、怎么估、怎么控。
越早把账算清，越不容易后面被账单追着跑。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: Claude Code 干活不是白来的，尤其团队一起用时，成本会很快显出来。
这页就像算农忙请工的账，要知道哪种活最费、哪种配置最烧钱。
不怕花钱，怕的是不知道钱花到哪去了。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先盯住大头：模型选择、使用频率、自动化任务。
成本异常时，不要只怪工具，先看是不是流程设计太重。
监控和成本要配着看，单看一头容易判断失真。

When you are using compact, please focus on test output and code changes

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Offload processing to hooks and skills 1
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：Custom hooks can preprocess data before Claude sees it. Instead of Claude reading a 10,000-line log file to find errors, a hook can grep for ERROR and return only matching lines, reducing context from tens of thousands of tokens to hundreds. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Offload processing to hooks and skills 2
steps.body: 这一步是让你在终端里敲命令。这一小节原文主要在讲：Custom hooks can preprocess data before Claude sees it. Instead of Claude reading a 10,000-line log file to find errors, a hook can grep for ERROR and return only matching lines, reducing context from tens of thousands of tokens to hundreds. 下面这块属于“命令”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。
steps.code:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command')

# If running tests, filter to show only failures
if [[ "$cmd" =~ ^(npm test|pytest|go test) ]]; then
  filtered_cmd="$cmd 2>&1 | grep -A 5 -E '(FAIL|ERROR|error:)' | head -100"
  echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"allow\",\"updatedInput\":{\"command\":\"$filtered_cmd\"}}}"
else
  echo "{}"
fi

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Code intelligence plugins give Claude precise symbol navigation instead of text-based search, reducing unnecessary file reads when exploring unfamiliar code. A single “go to definition” call replaces what might otherwise be a grep followed by reading multiple candidate files. Installed language servers also report type errors automatically after edits, so Claude catches mistakes without running a compiler.。

sections.title: Move instructions from CLAUDE.md to skills
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Move instructions from CLAUDE.md to skills”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Your CLAUDE.md file is loaded into context at session start. If it contains detailed instructions for specific workflows (like PR reviews or database migrations), those tokens are present even when you’re doing unrelated work. Skills load on-demand only when invoked, so moving specialized instructions into skills keeps your base context smaller. Aim to keep CLAUDE.md under ~500 lines by including only essentials.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: Adjust extended thinking
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Adjust extended thinking”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Extended thinking is enabled by default with a budget of 31,999 tokens because it significantly improves performance on complex planning and reasoning tasks. However, thinking tokens are billed as output tokens, so for simpler tasks where deep reasoning isn’t needed, you can reduce costs by lowering the effort level with /effort or in /model, disabling thinking in /config, or lowering the budget (for example, MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=8000).。
这里还牵扯模型怎么选，速度、成本和能力通常要一起掂量。

sections.title: Delegate verbose operations to subagents
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Delegate verbose operations to subagents”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Running tests, fetching documentation, or processing log files can consume significant context. Delegate these to subagents so the verbose output stays in the subagent’s context while only a summary returns to your main conversation.。

sections.title: Manage agent team costs
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Manage agent team costs”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Agent teams use approximately 7x more tokens than standard sessions when teammates run in plan mode, because each teammate maintains its own context window and runs as a separate Claude instance. Keep team tasks small and self-contained to limit per-teammate token usage. See agent teams for details.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲团队分析，帮你从数据上看大家到底怎么在用 Claude Code。
不是凭感觉说“大家好像常用”，而是拿数说话。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像看地里哪块出苗快、哪块总缺水。只有看清分布，后面才知道怎么调。
分析数据能帮你发现哪些功能最常用，哪些培训还没跟上。
对团队负责人来说，这页的价值在于“看清楚”而不是“看热闹”。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先选几个真能指导决策的指标，不要贪多。
分析结果出来后，最好能转成具体动作，比如培训、收权限、调默认配置。
别把分析当报表摆设，要让它反过来影响团队用法。

plugin-marketplaces.sourceLabel: Create and distribute a plugin marketplace

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲怎么做自己的插件市场，把常用插件统一发给团队。
适合团队想把“好用的扩展包”集中管理起来。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这就像村里开个统一农具站，常用家伙都放这里，谁要用就按规矩领。
好处是插件来源更清楚，版本更统一，不用每个人各自乱找。
如果你们已经开始广泛用插件，这页很有价值。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先挑团队最常用、最稳定的几类插件收进市场。
别一开始就铺太大，先把来源、版本和审核规则定稳。
市场做起来后，重点不只是“能装”，还得“可控、可更新、可追踪”。

illustration.title: 一眼看懂这一页
lines: Create and distribute a plugin marketplace
这是 Administration 里的一摊要紧活
illustration.caption: 先把这页到底在讲什么看明白，再去碰具体命令和配置，最不容易绕晕。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲 Claude Code 的总设置盘，也就是各种旋钮和挡位到底怎么分层去拧。
全局配置、项目配置、环境变量，这一页会把层级关系讲清。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像家里、院里、眼前这次活，三层规矩一起管人。离现场越近的规矩，通常越顶用。
这一页最关键的不是某一个设置项，而是让你搞懂配置作用域、作用顺序、哪些东西会吃这些作用域。
如果你老觉得“明明改了怎么不生效”，多半就是这页没看明白。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 个人习惯放全局，项目规矩放仓库，临时试验再用环境变量或临时参数。
先分清作用域，再去改具体设置，不然很容易改错地方。
权限和沙箱相关设置尤其要谨慎，别为了省事一把全放开。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲的是 Claude Code 到底能碰什么、不能碰什么。
说白了，就是先把帮工的活动范围画清楚，免得它手伸得太长。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 你可以把权限想成院门钥匙和工具柜钥匙。哪把给它，哪把先别给，得提前说清。
这一页重点不是炫技，而是教你怎么把“能读、能改、能执行”这些权限拆开管。
如果你想既让它干活，又不想它乱跑，这页就是硬规矩。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先从最保守的权限开始，确认任务确实需要，再一点点放开。
Bash、读写文件、联网请求这些权限不要混着开，最好一类一类验。
真要让它长期进项目干活，就把规则写细，别只靠临时口头交代。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲的是沙箱，也就是给 Claude Code 围一个安全活动圈。
意思很简单：让它能干活，但别一脚踩出院墙。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 沙箱就像给帮工划出来的工作区。它可以在圈里翻土、搬东西，但不能想去哪儿就去哪儿。
这页重点会讲文件隔离、网络隔离，还有为什么这样做更安全。
如果你想多开自动化能力，又怕它误伤环境，这页必须先看。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先弄清你最担心的是改坏文件，还是乱联网，再选对应限制。
不要只图方便把沙箱全拆掉，特别是在自动运行和团队环境里。
沙箱和权限是一起看的，不是只看其中一个就够。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Network Sandboxing Limitations: The network filtering system operates by restricting the domains that processes are allowed to connect to. It does not otherwise inspect the traffic passing through the proxy and users are responsible for ensuring they only allow trusted domains in their policy.；Users should be aware of potential risks that come from allowing broad domains like github.com that may allow for data exfiltration. Also, in some cases it may be possible to bypass the network filtering through domain fronting.。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲终端环境怎么调，才能让 Claude Code 用起来顺手。
很多体验问题，不是 Claude 坏，是终端底子没打好。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 这像修工作台。台子不稳，师傅手艺再好也难发挥。
终端字体、颜色、复制粘贴、输入回显这些细节，都会影响日常手感。
这页适合刚开始长期用终端版的人先补一遍。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先把最影响体验的地方调顺，比如显示、输入、编码和复制粘贴。
如果你总觉得命令行用着别扭，多半这页有你要的答案。
环境调好后，再去谈更高级的用法，事半功倍。

sections.title: Themes and appearance
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Themes and appearance”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：Claude cannot control the theme of your terminal. That’s handled by your terminal application. You can match Claude Code’s theme to your terminal any time via the /config command.；For additional customization of the Claude Code interface itself, you can configure a custom status line to display contextual information like the current model, working directory, or git branch at the bottom of your terminal.。
这里还牵扯模型怎么选，速度、成本和能力通常要一起掂量。

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲模型怎么配，不同模型该在什么活上出场。
说白了，就是选对工种。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 有的模型像慢工细活的老师傅，有的像跑得快的短工。
这一页会帮助你分清速度、成本、效果之间怎么拿捏。
选对了，干活更顺；选错了，不是慢就是贵，要么效果还一般。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先按活路来选模型，不要只盯最强或最便宜。
团队统一使用时，最好先定几个默认挡位。
模型配置最好和成本、快速模式一起看。

fast-mode.sourceLabel: Speed up responses with fast mode

sections.title: 简要总结
paragraphs: 这页讲快速模式，也就是图更快回话时该怎么开。
它不是白捡便宜，而是拿速度去换一些别的东西。

sections.title: 农民伯伯版解释
paragraphs: 快速模式像赶集时走大路快车，能更快到，但账和取舍得提前想清。
这一页最关键的不是“怎么开”，而是“什么时候值得开”。
如果你只是图一时快，没看清代价，很容易后面又嫌不合适。

sections.title: 上手时重点盯住什么
paragraphs: 先看成本和效果取舍，再决定要不要默认开。
适合短平快、对速度更敏感的活，不一定适合所有任务。
团队环境里最好把开关规则说清，别每个人各用各的。

steps.title: 原页关键片段：Require per-session opt-in
steps.body: 这一步是让你改配置或新建配置文件。这一小节原文主要在讲：By default, fast mode persists across sessions: if a user enables fast mode, it stays on in future sessions. Administrators on Teams or Enterprise plans can prevent this by setting fastModePerSessionOptIn to true in managed settings or server-managed settings. This causes each session to start with fast mode off, requiring users to explicitly enable it with /fast. 下面这块属于“配置”，关键命令、文件名和参数最好照原样保留。

sections.title: Require per-session opt-in
paragraphs: 这一节讲“Require per-session opt-in”。先把这小块的门道听明白，再照着下面的命令和配置去做。

原文这段重点会围着这些事打转：By default, fast mode persists across sessions: if a user enables fast mode, it stays on in future sessions. Administrators on Teams or Enterprise plans can prevent this by setting fastModePerSessionOptIn to true in managed settings or server-managed settings. This causes each session to start with fast mode off, requiring users to explicitly enable it with /fast.；This is useful for controlling costs in organizations where users run multiple concurrent sessions. Users can still enable fast mode with /fast when they need speed, but it resets at the start of each new session. The user’s fast mode preference is still saved, so removing this setting restores the default persistent behavior.。
这部分还会反复提作用域，意思就是这条规则到底管当前项目、你个人，还是只管这一趟会话。
